channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oracle Denies Requests for Enhanced Severance Following Mass Layoffs
item.description: In a major workforce reduction on March 31, 2026, Oracle laid off between 20,000 and 30,000 employees via email. Affected workers experienced immediate account deactivation on VPN and Slack, followed ...

item.title: Tamil Nadu Government Formation: TVK Receives Left Support, VCK Yet to Decide
item.description: In Tamil Nadu, uncertainty over the new government continued as actor-turned-politician C. Joseph Vijay’s party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), secured unconditional support from the Communist Party ...

item.title: Kenya to Host Africa Forward Summit, Showcasing Youth-Led Digital Innovations
item.description: Kenya is strategically positioning itself as a leader in digital innovation across Africa as it gears up to host the inaugural Africa Forward Summit in Nairobi, in partnership with the French governme...

item.title: U.S. Expands Passport Revocations for Parents Owing Child Support
item.description: The U.S. State Department has announced a new policy to revoke passports of Americans with significant overdue child support, marking a shift from previous practices. Previously, only those applying f...

item.title: Local elections 2026 highlight fragmentation of traditional UK politics
item.description: The 2026 local elections in England, Scotland, and Wales have indicated a significant shift away from the traditional two-party system. Reform UK, led by Nigel Farage, celebrated gains in London counc...

item.title: Pennsylvania’s Paid Leave Bill May Not Fully Support Sandwich Generation Caregivers
item.description: The number of family caregivers in the U.S. has grown from 53 million in 2020 to 63 million in 2025, and this trend is expected to continue as the baby boomer population ages. Family caregivers, often...

item.title: 'Kuwentong Nanay' on It's Showtime Highlights the Joys and Challenges of Moms This Mother's Day
item.description: This Mother's Day 2026, ABS-CBN's 'It's Showtime' featured a special segment called 'Kuwentong Nanay,' which showcased touching, funny, and at times heartbreaking stories about Filipino mothers. The s...

item.title: Motorcycle dispute in Taguig results in stabbing of passenger
item.description: In Taguig City, Metro Manila, a road rage incident turned violent on Thursday when a motorcycle rider, identified only as 48-year-old Sherwin, stabbed the back-rider of another motorcycle using a scre...

item.title: Mozambican convicted and sentenced to multiple life terms for murder of Free State police officer
item.description: A Mozambican man, Frimino David Matola, 55, has been sentenced to multiple life terms by the Free State High Court for the murder of Sgt Disema Steven Mapane during a shoot-out in Welkom. Matola was a...

item.title: Man denies threatening Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor in alleged incident
item.description: The news article reports that a man has formally denied using threatening behaviour towards Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor. Details regarding the nature of the alleged threat or the context in which it oc...

item.title: Suzie Miller on Theatre, Social Justice, and Breaking Barriers
item.description: Suzie Miller, the acclaimed Australian playwright, has built a remarkable career spanning over two decades and 40 plays, tackling challenging social issues on stage. Growing up in St Kilda in a workin...

item.title: Sipalay Hosts the Exciting BVR On Tour Volleyball Tournament This Weekend
item.description: The much-anticipated BVR On Tour Sipalay Open is set to officially begin this Saturday in Sipalay City. This prestigious beach volleyball tournament, organized by the Beach Volleyball Republic (BVR), ...

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship Causes Three Deaths, Passengers Held in Isolation
item.description: During a cruise across the Atlantic from Argentina, a serious hantavirus outbreak has caused panic among passengers aboard the MV Hondius. Three people have died, including a Dutch couple and a German...

item.title: Alberta and Ottawa continue negotiations on pipeline and carbon-capture agreement
item.description: Premier Danielle Smith of Alberta has called on the federal government to conclude ongoing negotiations over a potential oil pipeline and carbon-capture project. The agreement, part of a broader memor...

item.title: Tanimu Turaki-Led PDP Faction Holds Strategic Meeting With Former President Jonathan
item.description: On Friday, the Tanimu Turaki-led faction of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) waka go meet former President Goodluck Jonathan for important discussions. This meeting happen just less than two days af...

item.title: Micron Launches 245TB SSD for Enterprise and AI Applications
item.description: Micron has announced the release of the world's highest-capacity commercially available solid-state drive (SSD), the Micron 6600 ION, which offers an astonishing 245TB of storage on a single drive. Ta...

item.title: Liberal MP Nate Erskine-Smith seeks Ontario seat and leadership bid
item.description: Nate Erskine-Smith, the federal Liberal MP for Beaches-East York, is pursuing a seat in Scarborough Southwest to position himself for the Ontario Liberal leadership. Known for his independent streak a...

item.title: MP Kimani Ichung'wah Still With UDA, Viral Claims of Defection False
item.description: There has been a viral TikTok claiming that Kimani Ichung'wah, the MP for Kikuyu constituency and Kenya's national assembly majority leader, has left President William Ruto's United Democratic Allianc...

item.title: Colorado man sentenced to 224 years for murder of UCCS professor after skipping court
item.description: Caesar Lorenzo Wilson, 54, has been sentenced to 224 years in prison for the 2024 murder of University of Colorado Colorado Springs professor Haleh Abghari. The crime began as a burglary at Abghari's ...

item.title: China Confirms Technical Support to Pakistan During May 2025 India-Pakistan Conflict
item.description: For the first time, China has publicly confirmed that it offered technical and operational support to Pakistan during the four-day conflict with India in May 2025, according to the South China Morning...
